notes: Closed entries include a reason in issue. Actionable-open entries identify schema families that need a later propagation pass.

control-weather::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: detector false positive from changing weather stages by one; no attack roll or saving throw modifier exists.

control-weather::social_or_knowledge_eff.issue: Closed: DM-determined current conditions are now represented by aiContext and weather-control utility options, not a social/knowledge effect.
control-weather::social_or_knowledge_eff.recommendedTemplateChange: Added weather utility options and DM-stage prompt.

control-weather::environmental_change.issue: Closed: precipitation, temperature, wind, delay, stage shifts, and wind direction are now explicit structured/runtime utility options.
control-weather::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Added controlOptions for weather families and delay.

control-weather::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: outdoor casting requirement and indoors early ending are now explicit utility options.

control-weather::aftermath_or_memory.issue: Closed: weather gradually returning to normal is environmental aftermath, now preserved in the Indoors ending option detail.
control-weather::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedJsonChange: No separate aftermath JSON field needed.

demiplane::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: new demiplane, previous demiplane, and known other demiplane choices are now utility options and runtime prompt/control options.

demiplane::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Closed: flat solid surface targeting is now captured in Target Filter Notes and runtime validTargets uses objects/point.
demiplane::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Target Filter Notes and object_or_surface target category.
demiplane::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Changed validTargets to objects and point.

demiplane::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: surface requirement is target eligibility, not terrain; it is now captured in Target Filter Notes.

demiplane::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: "can see within range" is ordinary line-of-sight targeting already represented by Line of Sight true.

demiplane::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Closed: demiplane connection modes and vanishing-door shunt are now explicit utility/control options.
demiplane::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Added controlOptions for door connection and shunt.

demiplane::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Closed: knowing another demiplane nature and contents is now captured in the Known other demiplane option.

demiplane::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: optional shunting through the vanishing door now has an explicit Prone structured condition and runtime STATUS_CONDITION effect.

demiplane::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: door vanishing and creature/object persistence at spell end are preserved in utility options and canonical description.

demiplane::aftermath_or_memory.issue: Closed: objects and creatures remaining in the demiplane after the spell ends are now represented by the vanishing-door option and description.
demiplane::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedJsonChange: No separate aftermath JSON field needed.

dominate-monster::attack_or_save_modifie.issue: Closed: initial Wisdom save, fighting-advantage modifier, and damage-triggered repeat save are now machine-readable.
dominate-monster::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Save Modifier rows and Save Outcome negates_condition.
dominate-monster::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedJsonChange: Added Charmed STATUS_CONDITION with saveModifier and on_damage repeatSave.

dominate-monster::reaction_or_opportunit.issue: Closed: commanding the target Reaction at the caster Reaction cost is now a structured utility option and granted runtime reaction action.

dominate-monster::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: sight is ordinary targeting and already represented by Line of Sight true.

dominate-monster::message_or_communicati.issue: Closed: telepathic link and no-action command messaging are now structured/runtime utility options.
dominate-monster::message_or_communicati.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Telepathic link and No-action command options.

dominate-monster::summon_or_controlled_e.issue: Closed: detector matched command/control language; this spell controls an existing target rather than summoning a new entity, now represented by Charmed plus command options.

dominate-monster::travel_or_planar_movem.issue: Closed: same-plane limit belongs to the telepathic command link and is now recorded in the Telepathic link option.

dominate-monster::social_or_knowledge_ef.issue: Closed: Charmed control, command behavior, and self-directed behavior are now structured/runtime effects.
dominate-monster::social_or_knowledge_ef.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Conditions Applied and control options.

dominate-monster::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: Charmed is now an explicit structured condition and runtime STATUS_CONDITION effect.

earthquake::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: fissure placement choice and optional fissure/structure effects are now structured/runtime utility options.
earthquake::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Fissures and Structures utility options.

earthquake::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: Dexterity saves for tremor/fissures/collapse and half-damage collapse save are now represented by status/damage effects where supported.
earthquake::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Changed Save Outcome to negates_condition and added effect rows.
earthquake::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Added Prone/Buried status effects and collapse damage save effect.

earthquake::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: Closed: recurring cast/end-of-caster-turn applications are now represented by Triggered Applications and runtime effect trigger details where supported.
earthquake::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Added turn_end trigger to structure damage and utility option text for recurring timing.

earthquake::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: Difficult Terrain and fissure surface rules are now structured/runtime utility options with Terrain Type difficult.
earthquake::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Terrain Type difficult and Tremor/Fissures options.

earthquake::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: sight is ordinary point targeting and already represented by Line of Sight true.

earthquake::created_object_or_structure.issue: Closed: fissures and structure-collapse interactions are now explicit utility options instead of prose-only text.

earthquake::object_stats_or_damageabilit.issue: Closed: 50 Bludgeoning structure damage and collapse consequences are now represented by structured Damage Trigger and runtime DAMAGE effects.
earthquake::object_stats_or_damageabilit.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Damage Trigger and structure utility options.
earthquake::object_stats_or_damageabilit.recommendedJsonChange: Added 50 Bludgeoning and 12d6 Bludgeoning damage effects.

earthquake::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: Prone and Buried are now explicit structured conditions and runtime STATUS_CONDITION effects.
earthquake::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Added STATUS_CONDITION Prone and Buried effects.

earthquake::environmental_change.issue: Closed: tremor, difficult terrain, fissures, and structure collapse are now split into explicit utility options.

earthquake::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: detector matched duration wording; no unusual early-ending mechanic exists beyond concentration/duration already represented.

feeblemind::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: damage was corrected from 10d12 to canonical 4d6, and Intelligence save/status consequences are now modeled.
feeblemind::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Damage Dice remains 4d6 and utility options added.
feeblemind::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Corrected damage.dice to 4d6 and added Feebleminded status/utility effects.

feeblemind::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: detector false positive from "can see"; line-of-sight targeting already represents this.

feeblemind::message_or_communication.issue: Closed: language understanding and intelligible communication lockout are now explicit structured/runtime utility options.
feeblemind::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Language and communication lockout option.

feeblemind::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Closed: personality/intellect shattering, friend recognition, language lockout, and communication lockout are now recorded under Feeblemind utility/status effects.
feeblemind::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Feebleminded condition and utility options.

feeblemind::healing_or_restoration.issue: Closed: greater restoration, heal, and wish ending the spell is now represented by Restoration ending utility option.

feeblemind::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: 30-day repeat save and restoration spell ending are now utility options while the long-interval repeat-save schema gap remains tracked separately.
feeblemind::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Long interval repeat save and Restoration ending options.

control-weather.issue: Actionable open: Control Weather relies on omitted precipitation, temperature, and wind stage tables plus a random 1d4 x 10 minute delay; current schema can only preserve this as options/prompt text.
control-weather.recommendedTemplateChange: Add weather-stage table fields and delayed-effect formula fields.
control-weather.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime weatherControl object with precipitation/temperature/wind stages, direction, delay formula, and return-to-normal behavior.
control-weather.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
control-weather.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
control-weather.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

demiplane.issue: Actionable open: Demiplane creates persistent extradimensional storage and can reconnect to prior/known demiplanes; current schema preserves this as options but has no persistent-place identity model.
demiplane.recommendedTemplateChange: Add persistent extradimensional location fields with ownership/knowledge/connect rules.
demiplane.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime demiplane/location object with id/owner/known-contents/connect mode and contents persistence.
demiplane.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
demiplane.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
demiplane.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

dominate-monster.canonicalEvidence: Whenever the target takes damage, it repeats the save, ending the spell on itself on a success.
dominate-monster.structuredState: Save Modifier and Charmed condition rows now exist.
dominate-monster.jsonState: STATUS_CONDITION Charmed includes repeatSave timing on_damage.
dominate-monster.issue: Closed: damage-triggered repeat save is now encoded in runtime repeatSave metadata.
dominate-monster.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional template change needed for this spell.
dominate-monster.recommendedJsonChange: No additional JSON change needed for this spell.

earthquake.issue: Actionable open: Earthquake needs random fissure counts, variable fissure dimensions, structure height-derived collapse radius, and escape checks; current schema preserves these in options but not fully as data.
earthquake.recommendedTemplateChange: Add random-count/random-dimension, structure-collapse radius, and escape-check fields for environmental hazards.
earthquake.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalHazards/fissures/structureCollapse objects with random formulas, derived radius, and escape DC/action data.
earthquake.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
earthquake.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
earthquake.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

feeblemind.issue: Actionable open: Feeblemind needs ability-score set-to-1 fields, spellcasting/magic-item/language/communication lockout fields, 30-day repeat saves, and explicit ending spells; current schema preserves these as utility/status text.
feeblemind.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-score override, capability lockout, long-interval repeat save, and ending-spell-list fields.
feeblemind.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
feeblemind.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
feeblemind.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
